description_html:
Did Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John really write the Gospels? Or were these books actually anonymous from the beginning? And if they were, what would that mean for Christianity? This week, Frank sits down with New Testament scholar Dr. Mike Licona to unpack his latest debate with Bart Ehrman, one of the world’s best-known New […]

The post Bible Expert Reveals Who REALLY Wrote the Gospels? appeared first on CrossExamined.
